JournalEntry.title: Journal Entry
JournalEntry.description: A trading journal entry containing an image or video and associated metadata.

userId.description: ID of the user who owns this entry

mediaUrl.description: URL to the image or video in Storage

title.description: Title or short description of the journal entry

notes.description: Additional text details or lessons learned

streak.description: Trading streak condition at the time

expectationFulfilled.description: Did the setup meet the trader's expectations?

/journal_entries/{entryId}.description: Stores user journal entries containing trading screenshots/videos and their metadata.
